== Notes for [[Item:Q105478|Q105478]] ==

Anna Or Don "the Consobrina" VERCH MATHONWY

* NAME: Don (Danu Anu) ferch MATHONWY

* NAME: FERCH MATHONWY

* NAME: Don FERCH MATHONWY

* NAME: Don FERCH MATHONWY

* BIRTH: of Arimathaea, Ramathaim- Zophim, now Ramallah, Israel

* DEATH: Y

* EVENT: Notes: [32989]

Father: Joseph Ben Matthat or Mathonwy

Husband #1: James the just, the brother of the Lord 0001 - 0082

* MARRIAGE:

+Anna or Enygeus the prophetess 0060 - ____

Husband #2: Beli or Heli Mawr The Great AP MANOGAN 110 B.C. - 0072 B.C.

* MARRIAGE: [NF13865] [38504] [38505]

+Lud Or Llaw Or Llud Or Nudd Or Nodens Or Or Llud Llaw Eirint "Silver Handed" AP BELI Bef 0072 B.C. - 0018 B.C.

+Casswallan or Cassivelaunos or Cassivellaunus OF BRITIAN Bef 0060 B.C. - Abt 0048 B.C.

Llefelys ____ - ____

Afallach or Amalech or Avallach AP BELI Abt 0002 - ____



My Biography

Download GEDCOM File

Contact Webmaster:

HOME

INDEX



_Achim BEN SADOC _+

|



_Eliud BEN ACHIM _|__________________

|



_Eleazar BEN ELIUD __|

| |

| | __________________

| | |



| |__________________|__________________

|



_Matthat BEN ELEAZAR _|

| |

| | __________________

| | |



| | __________________|__________________

| | |



| |_____________________|

| |

| | __________________

| | |



| |__________________|__________________

|



_Joseph Ben Matthat or Mathonwy _|

| |

| | __________________

| | |



| | __________________|__________________

| | |



| | _____________________|

| | | |

| | | | __________________

| | | | |



| | | |__________________|__________________

| | |



| |______________________|

| |

| | __________________

| | |



| | __________________|__________________

| | |



| |_____________________|

| |

| | __________________

| | |



| |__________________|__________________

|



|

|--Anna Or Don "the Consobrina" VERCH MATHONWY

|

| __________________

| |



| __________________|__________________

| |



| _____________________|

| | |

| | | __________________

| | | |



| | |__________________|__________________

| |



| ______________________|

| | |

| | | __________________

| | | |



| | | __________________|__________________

| | | |



| | |_____________________|

| | |

| | | __________________

| | | |



| | |__________________|__________________

| |



|_________________________________|

|

| __________________

| |



| __________________|__________________

| |



| _____________________|

| | |

| | | __________________

| | | |



| | |__________________|__________________

| |



|______________________|

|

| __________________

| |



| __________________|__________________

| |



|_____________________|

|

| __________________

| |



|__________________|__________________

[NI172609]

[32989] the Cosobrina literally translated means cousin or niece) of the Blessed Virgin see also Joseph of Arimathia, page 107 and 157.

[NF13865]

[32988] [S2] Human Family Project

[32986] [S13] Ancestry of Richard Plantagenet & Cecily de Neville

* PAGE: chart 1797

* QUALITY: 0

[32987] [S55] Bloodline of the Holy Grail; the Hidden Lineage of Jesus Revealed

* PAGE: p 174

1 UID 4D09DCF00E3C4D4F950978B4A0AA7B63FAA6

1 UID B537E74E5BAC144388F6D6E324D1F8E1842D

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I18662
# ID: I18662
# Name: Joseph "Saint James" of ARIMATHEA 1 2 3 4 5 6
# Sex: M
# Birth: in abt 38 BC Bethlehem Judea 2 3 4 5 6
# Death: in Jul 27 0082 AD Glastonbury Wales 2 3 4 5 6
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 6
# Change Date: 18 OCT 2001 3 4 5 6
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA

Father: MATTHAT
Mother: Miss JUST b: BEF 100

Marriage 1 Anna Daughter Of ELEAZOR b: BEF 100 in XX

Children

1. Has Children Anna The Prophetess ENYGEUS b: in abt 19 BC Jerusalem Judea


Sources:

1. Title: 13143.GED
Note: ABBR 13143.GED
Note: Source Media Type: Other

ABBR 13143.GED

NS174473
Text: Date of Import: Apr 20, 2001
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
3. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
4. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
5. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004
6. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000004308798782

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
